title: Supplement A to Form I-485, Adjustment of Status Under Section 245(i) | USCIS
content:
## I-485 Supplement A, Supplement A to Form I-485, Adjustment of Status Under Section 245(i)
Use this form to provide us with additional information if you are requesting to adjust status under section 245(i) of the Immigration and Nationality Act.

#### Forms and Document Downloads
01/20/25 . You can find the edition date at the bottom of the page on the form and instructions.
Dates are listed in mm/dd/yy format.
If you complete and print this form to mail it, make sure that the form edition date and page numbers are visible at the bottom of all pages and that all pages are from the same form edition. If any of the form’s pages are missing or are from a different form edition, we may reject your form.
If you need help downloading and printing forms, read our instructions .
You have 2 options for filing your Form I-485 Supplement A with USCIS:
Filing Your Form I-485 Supplement A by Mail
File Supplement A together with your Form I-485. Go to our Direct Filing Addresses for Form I-485, Application to Register Permanent Residence or Adjust Status page to see where you should file your application.
Filing Your Form I-485 Supplement A Online
First, create a USCIS online account or log in if you already have an account. To learn more about how to create or access your USCIS online account, visit our How to Create a USCIS Online Account page.
You can submit Form I-485 online with Supplement A at the time of filing. If  you already have a Form I-485 application pending with USCIS (with a receipt number that begins with IOE), you may file Supplement A online by itself, without any other forms (except for Form G-28, if you are filing as an attorney or accredited representative.
You can find the filing fee for Form I-485 Supplement A by visiting our Fee Schedule page.
If you previously filed your Form I-485 and it is still pending, be sure to include a copy of the I-797 receipt notice for your pending Form I-485 when you file your Form I-485 Supplement A.
Filing Tips: Review our Tips for Filing Forms by Mail page for information on how to ensure we will accept your form.
Don’t forget to sign your form. We will reject any unsigned form.
- USCIS Policy Manual Volume 7, Part C, 245(i) Adjustment
- Forms Available to File Online
